## Type of change

- [ ] Content — documentation text, examples, or translations
- [ ] Design — layout, styling, or UI components

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes (type check + build)
